title: Notification triggered by Benchmark
excerpt: I am tracking some critical (i.e. VIP handouts) inventory at several different show locations and would love to have the ability to trigger a notification when an inventory count hits a benchmark setup in a dashboard.

posts.author: PhillAllen (Phill Allen)
posts.cookedHtml: I am tracking some critical (i.e. VIP handouts) inventory at several different show locations and would love to have the ability to trigger a notification when an inventory count hits a benchmark setup in a dashboard.
